Bash(\\
  # stopwatch → build/stopwatch
  cp challenges/streams_stopwatch/lib/main.dart build/stopwatch/starter/lib/main.dart && \\
  cp challenges/streams_stopwatch/analysis_options.yaml build/stopwatch/starter/ && \\
  mv challenges/streams_stopwatch/SOLUTIONS.md build/stopwatch/SOLUTIONS.md && \\
  rm -rf challenges/streams_stopwatch && \\
  # rxdart_search → build/live_search
  cp challenges/rxdart_search/lib/main.dart build/live_search/starter/lib/main.dart && \\
  cp challenges/rxdart_search/analysis_options.yaml build/live_search/starter/ && \\
  mv challenges/rxdart_search/SOLUTIONS.md build/live_search/SOLUTIONS.md && \\
  rm -rf challenges/rxdart_search && \\
  # riverpod_todos → build/todos
  cp challenges/riverpod_todos/lib/main.dart build/todos/starter/lib/main.dart && \\
  cp challenges/riverpod_todos/analysis_options.yaml build/todos/starter/ && \\
  mv challenges/riverpod_todos/SOLUTIONS.md build/todos/SOLUTIONS.md && \\
  rm -rf challenges/riverpod_todos && \\
  echo "done")
